breaking.title_zh: Anthropic寻求300亿美元融资，估值逼近万亿美元
breaking.title_en: Anthropic Seeks $30B Funding at Near-Trillion Valuation
breaking.summary_zh: Anthropic正洽谈新一轮融资至少300亿美元，投前估值突破9000亿美元，直逼万亿美元。若达成，将超越OpenAI的8520亿美元估值。谷歌已承诺投资100亿美元，亚马逊出资50亿美元。
breaking.summary_en: Anthropic is in talks to raise at least $30B at a pre-money valuation exceeding $900B. If completed, it would surpass OpenAI's $852B valuation. Google committed $10B, Amazon $5B.

breaking.title_zh: OpenAI砸40亿美元抢前线部署工程师，成立部署公司
breaking.title_en: OpenAI Pours $4B into FDE Talent, Launches Deployment Company
breaking.summary_zh: OpenAI斥资40亿美元成立'部署公司'，收购咨询公司Tomoro，全力押注前线部署工程师（FDE）。传统软件工程师需求骤降70%，FDE需求激增近1000%，标志AI竞争从模型参数转向企业落地能力。
breaking.summary_en: OpenAI invests $4B to launch The Deployment Company and acquires Tomoro, betting on Frontline Deployment Engineers. Traditional SWE demand dropped 70%, FDE demand surged ~1000%.

daily.title_zh: 韩国'AI全民红利'提议引发股市一度重挫5%
daily.title_en: South Korea 'AI Citizen Dividend' Proposal Crashes Stock Market 5%
daily.excerpt_zh: 韩国总统府提议设立'AI公民红利'，市场恐慌三星、SK海力士遭征超额利润税，Kospi盘中重挫5.1%。官方澄清资金源于超额税收而非暴利税，但AI财富再分配已成重要政策风险。
daily.excerpt_en: Korea's presidential office proposed an 'AI citizen dividend', sparking panic of excess profit taxes on Samsung and SK Hynix. Kospi plunged 5.1% intraday before officials clarified the funding source.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic推出逾十款法律AI工具，覆盖合同审查到司法备考
daily.title_en: Anthropic Launches 10+ Legal AI Tools from Contract Review to Bar Prep
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic通过Claude Cowork向付费用户开放法律AI工具套件，覆盖合同审查、司法备考等。法律行业因文件处理量大被视为AI替代潜力较高领域，律师是Claude使用率最高的职业群体之一。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic released 10+ legal AI tools via Claude Cowork, covering contract review to bar exam prep. Lawyers are among the highest Claude user groups outside software developers.

daily.title_zh: 通用汽车IT部门裁员超10%，全面转向AI原生开发人才
daily.title_en: GM Cuts 10%+ of IT Staff to Pivot to AI-Native Developer Talent
daily.excerpt_zh: 通用汽车确认裁减IT部门约600名领薪员工，腾出资源招聘AI原生开发、数据工程、智能体开发专家。标志着从'AI工具应用'向'AI原生开发'的战略转型，目标实现AI系统全链路自研。
daily.excerpt_en: GM confirmed cutting ~600 salaried IT employees to free resources for AI-native developers, data engineers, and agent builders. A strategic shift from 'AI tool adoption' to 'AI-native development'.

daily.title_zh: GitLab大规模重组：裁员并宣称未来软件由机器构建、人类指导
daily.title_en: GitLab Restructures for AI Era: Cuts Staff, Says Software Will Be Machine-Built
daily.excerpt_zh: GitLab宣布重组计划'Act 2'，削减最多30%国家布局，精简职能部门最多三层管理层级，研发重组为60个小团队。CEO表示未来软件将由机器构建但人类指导，AI智能体承担编码审查任务。
daily.excerpt_en: GitLab announced 'Act 2' restructuring, cutting up to 30% of country footprint and flattening org layers. CEO says future software will be machine-built, human-guided, with agents handling coding tasks.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic拒绝中国研究人员访问新AI模型Mythos
daily.title_en: Anthropic Rejects Chinese Researchers' Access to New AI Model Mythos
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic拒绝向中国研究人员开放漏洞发现模型Mythos的访问权限，仅提供给美国政府和选定组织。中方代表4月在新加坡会议期间提出请求被拒，美国国安委对此高度担忧。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic denied Chinese researchers access to Mythos, its vulnerability-finding AI model. Access is restricted to US government and select organizations. The NSC is highly concerned about the contact.

daily.title_zh: 宇树发布全球首款量产版载人变形机甲GD01，起售390万元
daily.title_en: Unitree Unveils World's First Mass-Produced Human-Riding Mecha GD01
daily.excerpt_zh: 宇树发布全球首款量产版载人变形机甲GD01，直立行走和四足爬行双模式切换，载人后重约500公斤，起售390万元。公司2025年营收17亿元，人形机器人业务占比突破50%，冲刺科创板。
daily.excerpt_en: Unitree launched GD01, the world's first mass-produced human-riding mecha with dual-mode switching. Weighs ~500kg with rider, priced from $540K. 2025 revenue reached $240M, humanoid biz >50%.

daily.title_zh: 微软与OpenAI合作设营收分成上限380亿，OpenAI可省970亿
daily.title_en: Microsoft-OpenAI Deal Caps Revenue Share at $38B, Saving OpenAI $97B
daily.excerpt_zh: 微软与OpenAI最新合作协议设定380亿美元营收分成上限，相比原协议可能支付的1350亿美元，为OpenAI节省约970亿美元成本，有助于改善现金流并为上市做准备。
daily.excerpt_en: The new Microsoft-OpenAI agreement caps revenue sharing at $38B vs. potentially $135B, saving OpenAI ~$97B by 2030. This improves cash flow and supports IPO preparation.

daily.title_zh: 花旗预测：阿里云AI收入未来五年CAGR将达90%
daily.title_en: Citi Predicts Alibaba Cloud AI Revenue CAGR of 90% Over 5 Years
daily.excerpt_zh: 花旗预测阿里云AI相关收入将以90% CAGR从今年240亿元飙升至2031年5855亿元，占总云收入比例从15%跃升至70%。MaaS业务增速高达235%，阿里布局AI产业链四个领域。
daily.excerpt_en: Citi forecasts Alibaba Cloud AI revenue to grow at 90% CAGR from $3.3B to $81B by 2031, rising from 15% to 70% of total cloud revenue. MaaS business growth projected at 235% CAGR.
